calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor. Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Nancy Wong, Esq. for Petitioners Lishao Huang and Zhen Li (parents) as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Jue Li.
The Court granted Ms. Wong's request for a waiver of appearance by the Petitioners in open court. Ms. Wong was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minor to Eason Jue Li.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
